already_registered.en: You are already registered, no further action is required.
already_registered.id: Kamu udah terdaftar, nggak ada tindakan lebih lanjut yang diperluin.

registration_complete.en:
**Registration Complete**
-# You received a small bonus to get started:
registration_complete.id:
**Pendaftaran Berhasil**
-# Kamu dapet bonus kecil untuk memulai:

access_denied.en:
**Access Denied**
-# Your account has been flagged for potential bot activity. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact <@782922849169178657>
access_denied.id:
**Akses Ditolak**
-# Akunmu ditandai karena terindikasi aktivitas bot. Jika kamu yakin ini keliru, bisa hubungi <@782922849169178657>

not_registered.en: You are not registered, type `.register` to continue.
not_registered.id: Kamu belum terdaftar, ketik `.register` untuk mendaftar.

invalid_interaction.en: This interaction is not for you.

booster.en:
**Booster Exclusive**
-# Boost this server to unlock this command and other exclusive benefits!
booster.id:
**Eksklusif Booster**
-# Boost server ini untuk membuka command ini dan dapetin benefit eksklusif lainnya!

invalid_n.en: Invalid input, please enter a positive integer amount.
invalid_n.id: Input nggak valid, coba ketik bilangan bulat positif.

invalid_@.en: Invalid input, please specify a valid user.
invalid_@.id: Input nggak valid, coba mention user yang valid.

invalid_@unregistered.en: The target has not registered yet.

invalid_@bot.en: The target cannot be a bot.

invalid_@toopoor.en: The target is too poor to rob.

invalid_args.id: Input nggak valid, coba ketik jumlah argumen yang pas.

invalid_item.en: No item found with that name or the item cannot be used, please specify a valid item name.
invalid_item.id: Nggak ada item dengan nama itu atau item nggak bisa dipakai, coba ketik nama item yang valid.

cooldown.id: Kamu lagi kena cooldown, coba lagi <t:$sum[$getTimestamp;$getCooldown[global]]:R>.

cooldown_leaderboard.id: Papan peringkat baru aja di-update, coba lagi nanti.

cooldown_daily.en: You have already claimed your daily, come back <t:$var[timestampCd]:R> for the next one.
cooldown_daily.id: Kamu udah klaim hadiah harian, kembali lagi <t:$var[timestampCd]:R> buat klaim berikutnya.

cooldown_hourly.en: You have already claimed your hourly, come back <t:$sum[$getTimestamp;$getCooldown[global]]:R> for the next one.
cooldown_hourly.id: Kamu udah klaim hadiah per jam, kembali lagi <t:$sum[$getTimestamp;$getCooldown[global]]:R> buat klaim berikutnya.

cooldown_weekly.en: You have already claimed your weekly, come back <t:$sum[$getTimestamp;$getCooldown[global]]:R> for the next one.
cooldown_weekly.id: Kamu udah klaim hadiah mingguan, kembali lagi <t:$sum[$getTimestamp;$getCooldown[global]]:R> buat klaim berikutnya.

-# You reached level **$numberSeparator[$var[lvl];$json[sep]]** and received:

streak_ended.en:
**Oops, Your Streak Ended**

deposit.en:
**Deposit Successful**
-# Coins added to your bank with amount:
deposit.id:
**Deposit Berhasil**

deposit_fail.en: Your bank is full, use **$json[bnoteIcon] Bank Note** to increase your maximum bank capacity.
deposit_fail.id: Bank udah penuh, pakai **$json[bnoteIcon] Bank Note** buat nambah kapasitas maksimal bank.

withdraw.en:
**Withdrawal Successful**
-# Coins withdrawn from your bank with amount:
withdraw.id:
**Penarikan Berhasil**
-# Koin ditarik dari bank dengan jumlah:

withdraw_fail.en: Your bank is empty, there are no coins to withdraw.
withdraw_fail.id: Bank kamu kosong, nggak ada koin yang bisa ditarik.

empty_inventory.en: Nothing to see here, your inventory is empty.
empty_inventory.id: Nggak ada apa-apa di sini, inventorimu masih kosong.

bnote_desc.en: Raises maximum bank capacity by 75 coins per note, consumed on use
bnote_desc.id: Menambah kapasitas maksimal bank sebesar 75 koin per note, kepakai satu saat digunakan

box_desc.en: Unbox to receive a variety of rewards, consumed on use
box_desc.id: Buka buat dapetin berbagai macam hadiah, kepakai satu saat digunakan

tfpass_desc.en: Grants a one-time coin gifting to another user, consumed on use
tfpass_desc.id: Memberi kesempatan sekali buat ngirim koin ke user lain, kepakai satu saat digunakan

shield_desc.en: Provides a high chance to block a rob attempt, consumed per attempt
shield_desc.id: Memberi peluang besar buat nahan perampokan, kepakai tiap kali ada percobaan

insufficient_coin.en: You do not have any coins.

insufficient_rob.en: You need some coins before attempting this.
insufficient_rob.id: Kamu butuh koin dulu sebelum melakukan ini.

insufficient_tfpass.en: You need **$json[tfpassIcon] Gift Pass** to give coins.
insufficient_tfpass.id: Kamu butuh **$json[tfpassIcon] Tiket Gift** buat ngirim koin.

insufficient_box.en: You do not have any boxes.

item_not_found.en: Item not found in your inventory.

use_desc_bnote.en: Your maximum bank capacity has raised by:

gift_sent.en:
**Gift Sent Successfully**
-# Your gift has been sent to <@$var[target]>
gift_sent.id:
**Gift Berhasil Dikirim**
-# Gift-mu berhasil dikirim ke <@$var[target]>

unbox.en:
**Unbox Summary**
-# You opened $if[$var[x]>1]**$numberSeparator[$var[x];$json[sep]]** boxes$elsea box$endif and received:
unbox.id:
**Kotak Dibuka**

rob_success.en:
**Rob Successful**
-# $if[$var[protected]==true]The shield failed to stop you this time$elseYou slipped in and out with your reward:$endif
rob_success.id:
**Perampokan Berhasil**
-# $if[$var[protected]==true]Perisainya gagal ngehentiin kali ini$elseKamu berhasil ngerampok dia dan dapet:$endif

rob_fail.en:
**Rob Failed**
-# $if[$var[protected]==true]Their shield stopped you before you could act$elseThe attempt failed and you were fined:$endif
rob_fail.id:
